business.name: PAWSOME PETZ
business.tagline: Trusted Pet Grooming at Your Doorstep, Bengaluru

hero.heading: Professional Pet Grooming at Your Doorstep
hero.subheading: Gentle, hygienic, and stress-free grooming for dogs, puppies, cats & kittens — by Santosh, trusted by pet parents across Bengaluru.

about.heading: Meet Santosh — Your Trusted Pet Groomer
about.description_1: At PAWSOME PETZ, Santosh brings professional, gentle, and hygienic pet grooming right to your home. From playful puppies and curious kittens to senior dogs and nervous pets — every animal receives calm, patient, and personalized care.
about.description_2: Trusted by repeat customers across Bengaluru, Santosh uses sanitized tools, pet-safe products, and a loving approach that keeps your furry family members comfortable, clean, and happy after every session.

features.text: Doorstep grooming — we come to you
Gentle care for nervous & senior pets

services.title: Spa Bath
services.description: A relaxing full bath with shampoo & conditioner, blow dry, nail clipping, ear & eye cleaning, paw massage, and combing.

services.title: Hair Styling / Zero Cut
services.description: Full body haircut, trimming or zero cut with sanitary clipping, nail care, ear & eye cleaning, and brushing.
includes: Full Body Haircut / Trimming / Zero Cut

services.title: Basic Grooming
services.description: A thorough grooming session with bath, blow dry, face haircut, sanitary trim, teeth cleaning, paw massage, and more.

services.title: Full Service
services.description: The complete grooming experience — bath, full body trim, all cleaning & hygiene care, teeth cleaning, and paw massage.

why_us.title: Doorstep Grooming
why_us.description: We come to your home — no travel stress for your pet. Convenient, comfortable, and hassle-free.

why_us.title: Gentle & Patient
why_us.description: Even nervous, anxious, or senior pets are handled with calm patience and genuine care.

why_us.title: Safe & Hygienic
why_us.description: Pet-safe products and sanitized tools for every session — clean, safe, and professional.

why_us.title: All Pets Welcome
why_us.description: Dogs, puppies, cats, and kittens — all breeds, all ages, all temperaments.

why_us.title: 5-Star Rated
why_us.description: Trusted by 33+ happy pet parents on Google with a perfect 5.0 star rating.

why_us.title: Trusted by Repeat Clients
why_us.description: Our clients keep coming back — some for over 1.5 years — because quality and care never wavers.

reviews.name: Racheal Jane
reviews.text: Santhosh groomed our 11-year-old Husky at home and did an excellent job — bathing, blow drying, nail clipping, paw trimming, and ear cleaning. He handled her wonderfully and we were extremely happy with the service.

reviews.name: Rebecca Shanu
reviews.text: The groomer was exceptionally kind and gentle with Zara. He handled her with patience and care, making her comfortable throughout the session. We are completely satisfied with the grooming service.

reviews.name: Dipika Bhowmick
reviews.text: My Shih Tzu is usually very aggressive during grooming, but Santosh handles him calmly and patiently. He has now become our permanent groomer.

reviews.name: Dianna Peters
reviews.text: Really happy with the service. Home grooming makes the process stress-free for my pet. Professional, gentle, reliable, and thorough every time.

reviews.name: Monika Agrawal
reviews.text: Santosh has been grooming my Shih Tzu for over 1.5 years. He sanitizes all tools, follows instructions carefully, and consistently delivers excellent grooming results.

reviews.name: Simran Singh
reviews.text: He was very patient and gentle with my two-month-old kitten. The care and professionalism were outstanding. Highly recommended.

contact.heading: Book Your Pet's Grooming Session
contact.subheading: Call or WhatsApp Santosh to schedule a convenient doorstep grooming session. We confirm your slot quickly!
contact.address: C Sector, Amruthnagar, Byatarayanapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560024
